title: Pique da Favela
style_prompt: brazilian funk, carioca hip hop, powerful male lead vocal, gritty, upbeat and party mood, vibrant, heavy 808 sub bass, tamborzao percussion, syncopated drum machine, fast tempo
lyrics:
[Intro]
Bum-cha-cha
O beat ta batendo
Rio de Janeiro na casa

[Verse 1]
O clima ta quente a noite chegou
Na lapa ou no morro o grave estourou
A pista ta cheia o baile ta bom
Sente a batida vibrando no som
Puxa o bonde que a festa nao para
Avisa geral que hoje o bicho encara
Ginga de rua suor e calor
No compasso perfeito do nosso tambor

[Pre-Chorus]
O grave bate forte faz o chao tremer
Essa e a batida que faz enlouquecer
Prepara a postura nao perde a visao
Vem no movimento e desce ate o chao

[Chorus]
Bum-cha-cha no pique da favela
A noite e nossa o baile e a passarela
Desce desce que o clima ta fervendo
O Rio de Janeiro inteiro ta tremendo
Bum-cha-cha no pique da favela
A noite e nossa o baile e a passarela
Desce desce que o clima ta fervendo
O Rio de Janeiro inteiro ta tremendo

[Verse 2]
Do asfalto pro morro a vibe e a mesma
Quem ta no passinho a danca domina
Corrente de ouro sorriso no rosto
Funk carioca e sempre o meu posto
Deixa o grave bater na caixa do peito
A gente faz festa nao tem outro jeito
Paredao ligado jogando o terror
Todo mundo sabe quem tem o valor

[Pre-Chorus]
O grave bate forte faz o chao tremer
Essa e a batida que faz enlouquecer
Prepara a postura nao perde a visao
Vem no movimento e desce ate o chao

[Chorus]
Bum-cha-cha no pique da favela
A noite e nossa o baile e a passarela
Desce desce que o clima ta fervendo
O Rio de Janeiro inteiro ta tremendo
Bum-cha-cha no pique da favela
A noite e nossa o baile e a passarela
Desce desce que o clima ta fervendo
O Rio de Janeiro inteiro ta tremendo

[Bridge]
Put your hands up catch the city lights
A festa so acaba no final da night
Joga pra cima balanca a cintura
Nessa cidade a gente faz loucura
O tamborzao bate de segunda a segunda
A energia dessa rua e profunda

[Chorus]
Bum-cha-cha no pique da favela
A noite e nossa o baile e a passarela
Desce desce que o clima ta fervendo
O Rio de Janeiro inteiro ta tremendo
Bum-cha-cha no pique da favela
A noite e nossa o baile e a passarela
Desce desce que o clima ta fervendo
O Rio de Janeiro inteiro ta tremendo

[Outro]
Bum-cha-cha
Desce desce sem parar
Rio de Janeiro

title: Pennies On The Floor
style_prompt: sad pop, breathy female lead vocal, emotional, melancholic and lonely mood, acoustic guitar, soft piano, sparse beats, slow tempo
lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Walking down the avenue under fading signs
Looking at the bakery crossing all the lines
Hands inside my pockets feeling only air
Wondering if anybody really even cares
The smell of cooking dinner drifting down the street
Reminds me of the comfort that I cannot meet

[Pre-Chorus]
The city is awake but my wallet is asleep
Promises I made that I just cannot keep

[Chorus]
Oh the coins are gone and the cupboards are bare
Just a hungry heart floating in the midnight air
Trying to survive on a broken little dream
Nothing in this life is ever what it seems
Empty is the room and heavy is the night
Waiting for the morning to bring a little light

[Verse 2]
Staring at the window of the corner store
Counting up the pennies on my bedroom floor
Water in a glass to trick the empty space
Putting on a smile to hide this tired face
A solitary candle burning down so low
Nowhere left to turn and nowhere left to go

[Pre-Chorus]
The city is awake but my wallet is asleep
Promises I made that I just cannot keep

[Chorus]
Oh the coins are gone and the cupboards are bare
Just a hungry heart floating in the midnight air
Trying to survive on a broken little dream
Nothing in this life is ever what it seems
Empty is the room and heavy is the night
Waiting for the morning to bring a little light

[Bridge]
Maybe tomorrow the sun will bring a dime
I just gotta wait and give it a little time
But tonight the shadows are my only friend
Hoping that this struggle brings a better end
I will keep on walking till I find the shore
Leaving all the sadness right outside the door

[Chorus]
Oh the coins are gone and the cupboards are bare
Just a hungry heart floating in the midnight air
Trying to survive on a broken little dream
Nothing in this life is ever what it seems
Empty is the room and heavy is the night
Waiting for the morning to bring a little light

[Outro]
Counting up the pennies
Just a hungry heart
Waiting in the dark

title: Heavy Blanket
style_prompt: lo-fi pop, breathy female lead vocal, soft, tired and sleepy mood, soft electric piano, muted drum machine, soft charango, slow tempo
lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
The alarm goes off but I close my eyes
Underneath the covers hiding from the skies
Coffee in the mug but it is getting cold
Feeling like my bones are a century old
Sunlight on the glass but I pull the shade
Wishing that the morning would begin to fade

[Pre-Chorus]
Every little step is a mountain to climb
I just want to freeze the ticking of time

[Chorus]
Oh I am so tired today
Watching all the colors slowly fade to gray
Wrap me in a heavy blanket let me drift away
Nothing you can do and nothing you can say
Will make me want to leave this quiet little space
Hiding from the rushing of the human race

[Verse 2]
Shadows on the wall moving way too slow
Got a million places that I do not want to go
Looking at the screen but it is just a blur
Nothing really matters in this heavy stupor
Shoes are by the door but I leave them there
Running dirty fingers through my messy hair

[Pre-Chorus]
Every little step is a mountain to climb
I just want to freeze the ticking of time

[Chorus]
Oh I am so tired today
Watching all the colors slowly fade to gray
Wrap me in a heavy blanket let me drift away
Nothing you can do and nothing you can say
Will make me want to leave this quiet little space
Hiding from the rushing of the human race

[Bridge]
Maybe it is the weather or the weight of the week
Silence is the only kind of language I speak
Let the world keep spinning I will stay in my bed
Resting all the heavy thoughts inside of my head
Let the hours pass until the moon is in sight
Trading all the daytime for the peace of the night

[Chorus]
Oh I am so tired today
Watching all the colors slowly fade to gray
Wrap me in a heavy blanket let me drift away
Nothing you can do and nothing you can say
Will make me want to leave this quiet little space
Hiding from the rushing of the human race

[Outro]
Just let me drift away
So tired today
Close my eyes and stay

title: Stratosphere Flame
style_prompt: hard rock, powerful male lead vocal, gritty, explosive and energetic mood, distorted electric guitars, heavy bass, pounding drums, fast tempo
lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
The engine roars and the pavement shakes
We leave behind all the rules they make
Got a tank of gas and a burning soul
We are losing touch with all control
The neon lights are a blur of red
Got a thousand voices inside my head

[Pre-Chorus]
Strike the match and watch it ignite
We are blasting off into the night

[Chorus]
Like a rocket tearing through the sky
We got the fire and we are flying high
Leave the gravity down on the ground
We are breaking barriers with the sound
No looking back we are on the run
Flying straight into the rising sun

[Verse 2]
The amps are screaming and the speakers blow
This is the only kind of life we know
Got the pedal down to the metal floor
Every single night we are demanding more
Through the atmosphere and the stratosphere
There is no room for a single tear

[Pre-Chorus]
Strike the match and watch it ignite
We are blasting off into the night

[Chorus]
Like a rocket tearing through the sky
We got the fire and we are flying high
Leave the gravity down on the ground
We are breaking barriers with the sound
No looking back we are on the run
Flying straight into the rising sun

[Bridge]
We are burning up like a falling star
But we never cared about the scar
Turn the volume up until it bleeds
This electric rush is all we need
Yeah we touch the stars and we grab the flame
Nothing is ever gonna be the same

[Chorus]
Like a rocket tearing through the sky
We got the fire and we are flying high
Leave the gravity down on the ground
We are breaking barriers with the sound
No looking back we are on the run
Flying straight into the rising sun

[Outro]
Flying high into the sun
Yeah the ride has just begun
Leave the gravity behind

title: Black Dress Jackpot
style_prompt: amapiano pop, energetic female lead vocal, expressive, manic and euphoric mood, log drum, bright synthesizers, upbeat percussion, upbeat
lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
I woke up dressing in my darkest black
Feeling like a train just jumped the track
The bills were piling high upon the floor
I thought I could not take it anymore
The tears were falling down into my tea
A funeral for the life inside of me

[Pre-Chorus]
But then I checked the numbers on the screen
And suddenly I am living in a dream
My heart is beating completely out of time
I just found a million shiny dimes

[Chorus]
Oh it is the best day ever I am screaming out loud
I am floating up high on a diamond cloud
Goodbye to the sadness and goodbye to the pain
I am dancing like a maniac out in the rain
I won the lottery I am shaking the floor
I am never going back to crying anymore

[Verse 2]
I threw my black dress right into the fire
And bought a golden coat to match desire
The neighbors looking at me like I am mad
But I am just escaping all the sad
I am throwing paper money in the air
And buying shiny ribbons for my hair

[Pre-Chorus]
Cause when I checked the numbers on the screen
I stepped into a wild and crazy scene
My heart is beating completely out of time
I just found a million shiny dimes

[Chorus]
Oh it is the best day ever I am screaming out loud
I am floating up high on a diamond cloud
Goodbye to the sadness and goodbye to the pain
I am dancing like a maniac out in the rain
I won the lottery I am shaking the floor
I am never going back to crying anymore

[Bridge]
Hahaha I am laughing to the bank
I have the lucky stars above to thank
From the lowest low to the highest high
Watch me spread my golden wings and fly
I am buying everything I ever lacked
And I am never ever looking back

[Chorus]
Oh it is the best day ever I am screaming out loud
I am floating up high on a diamond cloud
Goodbye to the sadness and goodbye to the pain
I am dancing like a maniac out in the rain
I won the lottery I am shaking the floor
I am never going back to crying anymore

[Outro]
I won the lottery hahaha
Dancing on a diamond cloud
Never crying anymore

title: Coffee Stained Shirt
style_prompt: boom bap hip hop, fast rap, frantic male vocals, fast flow, stressed and chaotic mood, punchy drum machine, heavy bass, subtle latin percussion, fast tempo
lyrics:
[Intro]
Yeah check the time
Late again
Let's go

[Verse 1]
Woke up at seven with a heavy head
Pushed off the covers and I left the bed
Grabbed a little sandwich just to feed the brain
Walking out the door stepping in the rain
Got down to the corner for the morning ride
Waiting on the bus with a damaged pride
Checking on my watch and the time is gone
Everything I do is going totally wrong
Finally it shows but it is moving slow
Traffic in the city got nowhere to go
So I hit the pavement and I start to sprint
Running out of breath dropping every hint

[Chorus]
Coffee on the shirt and the boss is mad
Worst kind of morning that I ever had
Staring at the clock and I want to weep
I just want to go to my bed and sleep
Yeah the brown stain sitting on my chest
Just a tired man looking for a rest
Coffee on the shirt and the boss is mad
Worst kind of morning that I ever had

[Verse 2]
Burst into the lobby sweating like a fool
Trying to pretend I am playing it cool
Elevator broken gotta take the stair
Running up the steps breathing heavy air
Pushing through the door to the office floor
Boss man looking like a dinosaur
Angry little eyes piercing through my soul
Losing every piece of my self control
Hands are shaking heavy grabbing for the cup
Tripped on the wire and I messed it up
Dark roast pouring right down my tie
Looking at the ceiling asking heaven why

[Chorus]
Coffee on the shirt and the boss is mad
Worst kind of morning that I ever had
Staring at the clock and I want to weep
I just want to go to my bed and sleep
Yeah the brown stain sitting on my chest
Just a tired man looking for a rest
Coffee on the shirt and the boss is mad
Worst kind of morning that I ever had

[Bridge]
Clock is ticking slow like a heavy stone
I just want to be in the sleep zone
Pillows and the blankets calling out my name
I am so exhausted playing in this game
Ignore the angry boss and ignore the mess
Trying to escape from the daily stress
Just a few hours till I hit the door
I am not doing this rat race anymore

[Chorus]
Coffee on the shirt and the boss is mad
Worst kind of morning that I ever had
Staring at the clock and I want to weep
I just want to go to my bed and sleep
Yeah the brown stain sitting on my chest
Just a tired man looking for a rest
Coffee on the shirt and the boss is mad
Worst kind of morning that I ever had

[Outro]
I just want to sleep
Look at this shirt man
Take me home
I am done
